metadata.description: Cross-platform agent plugins converted for VS Code

plugins.name: claude--agent-sdk-dev
plugins.description: Claude Agent SDK Development Plugin (from Claude Code)

plugins.name: claude--claude-opus-4-5-migration
plugins.description: Migrate your code and prompts from Sonnet 4.x and Opus 4.1 to Opus 4.5. (from Claude Code)

plugins.name: claude--code-review
plugins.description: Automated code review for pull requests using multiple specialized agents with confidence-based scoring (from Claude Code)

plugins.name: claude--commit-commands
plugins.description: Streamline your git workflow with simple commands for committing, pushing, and creating pull requests (from Claude Code)

plugins.name: claude--explanatory-output-style
plugins.description: Adds educational insights about implementation choices and codebase patterns (mimics the deprecated Explanatory output style) (from Claude Code)

plugins.name: claude--feature-dev
plugins.description: Comprehensive feature development workflow with specialized agents for codebase exploration, architecture design, and quality review (from Claude Code)

plugins.name: claude--frontend-design
plugins.description: Frontend design skill for UI/UX implementation (from Claude Code)

plugins.name: claude--hookify
plugins.description: Easily create hooks to prevent unwanted behaviors by analyzing conversation patterns (from Claude Code)

plugins.name: claude--learning-output-style
plugins.description: Interactive learning mode that requests meaningful code contributions at decision points (mimics the unshipped Learning output style) (from Claude Code)

plugins.name: claude--pr-review-toolkit
plugins.description: Comprehensive PR review agents specializing in comments, tests, error handling, type design, code quality, and code simplification (from Claude Code)

plugins.name: claude--ralph-wiggum
plugins.description: Implementation of the Ralph Wiggum technique - continuous self-referential AI loops for interactive iterative development. Run Claude in a while-true loop with the same prompt until task completion. (from Claude Code)

plugins.name: claude--security-guidance
plugins.description: Security reminder hook that warns about potential security issues when editing files, including command injection, XSS, and unsafe code patterns (from Claude Code)

plugins.name: codex--box
plugins.description: Search and reference your documents (from Codex)

plugins.name: codex--build-ios-apps
plugins.description: Build iOS apps with workflows for App Intents, SwiftUI UI work, refactors, performance audits, and simulator debugging. (from Codex)

plugins.name: codex--build-macos-apps
plugins.description: Build, run, test, debug, instrument, and implement local macOS apps using Xcode, SwiftUI, AppKit interop, unified logging, and shell-first desktop workflows. (from Codex)

plugins.name: codex--build-web-apps
plugins.description: Build web apps with workflows for UI reviews, React improvements, deployment, payments, and database design. (from Codex)

plugins.name: codex--canva
plugins.description: Search, create, edit designs (from Codex)

plugins.name: codex--cloudflare
plugins.description: Cloudflare platform plugin with curated skills for Workers, Wrangler, and Agents SDK plus the official Cloudflare API MCP server. (from Codex)

plugins.name: codex--coderabbit
plugins.description: AI-powered code review in Codex, powered by CodeRabbit. (from Codex)

plugins.name: codex--figma
plugins.description: Figma workflows for design implementation, Code Connect templates, and design system rule generation. (from Codex)

plugins.name: codex--game-studio
plugins.description: Design, prototype, and ship browser games with guided 2D and 3D workflows, asset pipelines, and playtesting support. (from Codex)

plugins.name: codex--github
plugins.description: Inspect repositories, triage pull requests and issues, debug CI, and publish changes through a hybrid GitHub connector and CLI workflow. (from Codex)

plugins.name: codex--gmail
plugins.description: Work with Gmail using the configured Gmail app connector. (from Codex)

plugins.name: codex--google-calendar
plugins.description: Connect Google Calendar for scheduling, availability, daily briefs, and event management. (from Codex)

plugins.name: codex--google-drive
plugins.description: Use Google Drive as the single entrypoint for Drive, Docs, Sheets, and Slides work. (from Codex)

plugins.name: codex--hugging-face
plugins.description: Inspect models, datasets, Spaces, and research (from Codex)

plugins.name: codex--jam
plugins.description: Screen record with context (from Codex)

plugins.name: codex--life-science-research
plugins.description: General life-sciences research workflows with query routing, evidence synthesis, and optional parallel subagent analysis across genetics, omics, biology, chemistry, structure, clinical evidence, and public dataset discovery. (from Codex)

plugins.name: codex--linear
plugins.description: Find and reference issues and projects. (from Codex)

plugins.name: codex--netlify
plugins.description: Deploy projects and manage preview or production releases on Netlify. (from Codex)

plugins.name: codex--notion
plugins.description: Notion workflows for implementation planning, research synthesis, meeting preparation, and knowledge capture. (from Codex)

plugins.name: codex--outlook-calendar
plugins.description: Connect Outlook Calendar for scheduling, daily briefs, event prep, and safe meeting changes. (from Codex)

plugins.name: codex--outlook-email
plugins.description: Work with Outlook Email using the configured Microsoft Outlook app connector. (from Codex)

plugins.name: codex--sentry
plugins.description: Inspect recent issues and events in Sentry from Codex. (from Codex)

plugins.name: codex--sharepoint
plugins.description: Work with SharePoint using the configured Microsoft SharePoint app connector. (from Codex)

plugins.name: codex--slack
plugins.description: Work with Slack using the configured Slack integration. (from Codex)

plugins.name: codex--stripe
plugins.description: Payments and business tools (from Codex)

plugins.name: codex--teams
plugins.description: Work with Teams using the configured Microsoft Teams app connector. (from Codex)

plugins.name: codex--test-android-apps
plugins.description: Test Android apps with emulator workflows for reproduction, screenshots, UI inspection, and log capture. (from Codex)

plugins.name: codex--vercel
plugins.description: Build and deploy web apps and agents (from Codex)

plugins.name: cursor--agent-compatibility
plugins.description: CLI-backed repo compatibility scans plus Cursor agents that audit startup, validation, and docs against reality. (from Cursor)

plugins.name: cursor--cli-for-agent
plugins.description: Patterns for designing CLIs that coding agents can run reliably: non-interactive flags, layered help with examples, pipelines, actionable errors, idempotency, and dry-run. (from Cursor)

plugins.name: cursor--continual-learning
plugins.description: Incrementally learns durable user preferences and workspace facts from transcript changes and keeps AGENTS.md up to date with plain bullet points. (from Cursor)

plugins.name: cursor--create-plugin
plugins.description: Scaffold and validate new Cursor plugins. Handles directory setup, manifest generation, and pre-submission quality checks for the marketplace. (from Cursor)

plugins.name: cursor--cursor-team-kit
plugins.description: Internal workflows used by Cursor developers for CI, code review, and shipping. Covers the full dev loop: CI monitoring and fixing, PR creation, merge conflicts, smoke tests, compiler checks, code cleanup, and work summaries. (from Cursor)

plugins.name: cursor--ralph-loop
plugins.description: Continuous self-referential AI loops for iterative development, implementing the Ralph Wiggum technique. Run the agent in a while-true loop with the same prompt until task completion. (from Cursor)

plugins.name: cursor--teaching
plugins.description: Skill mapping, practice plans, and learning retrospectives. Builds personalized roadmaps with milestones and practice checkpoints, and runs periodic reviews to adjust based on progress. (from Cursor)
